## 变更内容

<!-- 说明解决的问题、主要实现与不包含的范围。 -->

## 验证

- [ ] 已运行相关自动化测试
- [ ] 已完成必要的手动 GUI 验证
- [ ] 已更新受影响的文档、路线图或验收项
- [ ] 未提交数据集、模型、密钥、个人路径或生成缓存

## 视觉与数据影响

<!-- 如涉及 UI，请附截图；如涉及受管数据/格式，请说明迁移、回滚和兼容性。 -->

## English Summary

Describe the problem, implementation, scope excluded, and validation. Confirm that documentation is updated and that no datasets, models, secrets, personal paths, or generated caches are included. Attach screenshots for UI changes and explain migration, rollback, and compatibility for managed-data or format changes.
